goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'arrive by 12:00'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should arrive by 12:00
The train should depart from london kings cross and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and address
